comment.body: FYI my approach is to read the Sunday (weekly) or other recent long term writings every morning as I await the daily post. I even bundle relative comments re geopolitical, ME acquiring tech, etc. into an AI custom GPT to summarize and update as thongs re NWO evolve - fast! Helps a lot and sometimes prevents emotionally placed day trades. Just my method
